findings.title: n8n CVE-2025-68613 Added to CISA KEV — Second Actively Exploited n8n RCE in Two Weeks
findings.summary: CISA added CVE-2025-68613, a second n8n workflow expression evaluation RCE flaw, to the Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog on March 11 with a federal patch deadline of March 25.

findings.title: ICS Patch Tuesday: Critical Vulnerabilities Fixed by Siemens, Schneider, Moxa, Mitsubishi Electric
findings.affected_technology: Siemens, Schneider Electric, Moxa, Mitsubishi Electric ICS products
findings.summary: March 2026 ICS Patch Tuesday advisories from Siemens, Schneider Electric, Moxa, and Mitsubishi Electric address multiple critical and high-severity vulnerabilities in industrial control systems.

findings.title: Michelin Confirms 300GB Data Breach Linked to Oracle EBS Attack
findings.summary: Tire manufacturer Michelin confirmed a data breach in which attackers exploited Oracle EBS to exfiltrate over 300GB of corporate files now being leaked by the threat actors.

findings.title: Zombie ZIP Evasion Technique Bypasses AV and EDR Security Tools
findings.summary: A new technique called Zombie ZIP creates specially crafted compressed files that conceal malicious payloads in a way that evades detection by antivirus and EDR security products.

findings.title: CVE-2026-26113 and CVE-2026-26110: Microsoft Office Preview Pane RCE Flaws
findings.summary: Two critical Microsoft Office remote code execution vulnerabilities can be triggered simply by viewing a booby-trapped message in the Preview Pane, requiring no user interaction beyond previewing.

findings.title: Fortinet, Ivanti, and Intel Patch Multiple High-Severity Vulnerabilities
findings.summary: Fortinet, Ivanti, and Intel released patches for high-severity vulnerabilities that could lead to arbitrary code execution, privilege escalation, or authentication rate-limit bypass.

findings.title: CVE-2026-21440: AdonisJS Bodyparser Critical Path Traversal — Arbitrary File Write
findings.summary: A critical path traversal vulnerability in the AdonisJS bodyparser allows unauthenticated arbitrary file writing, with public PoC and writeup now available on GitHub.

findings.title: Stryker Wiper Attack Update: 5,000+ Workers Sent Home, Irish Operations Crippled
findings.summary: Krebs on Security reports Stryker sent home 5,000+ workers in Ireland, personal devices with Outlook were wiped, login pages defaced with Handala logo, and US headquarters declared a building emergency.

noted.summary: Meta disabled over 150,000 accounts linked to Southeast Asian scam centers in partnership with international law enforcement.
Bell Ambulance data breach impacted 238,000 individuals with exposed SSNs and driver license numbers.
GitHub Security Lab disclosed SSRF (CVE-2026-30844) and unauthorized data manipulation (CVE-2026-30843) vulnerabilities in Wekan.
GitHub Security Lab disclosed an access control bypass vulnerability in the AFFINE collaboration platform.
